task_text: What is the start date of the project the morning launch kit? Answer YYYY-MM-DD. Date only

next_step.current_state: Need bootstrap per rules before task work: tree /, then read AGENTS.md, then context. After that, inspect 40_projects for matching project folder and derive date from folder name.

After context, inspect 40_projects and nested AGENTS if entering folder, then read candidate READMEs.

This task is a read-only lookup, so likely no workflow/schema doc is relevant beyond that inspection. Next: inspect 99_system, then list projects and examine candidates for 'morning launch kit'.

Inspected 99_system tree; no obvious workflow/schema is relevant to this simple project-date lookup. Now proceeding to project area. Must read nested AGENTS when entering a folder, so read 40_projects/AGENTS.MD before examining project folders.
Read project-lane rules. Need identify which folder matches informal name 'morning launch kit'. Use list on 40_projects to inspect candidate folder names, then read plausible README(s).

Project list reviewed. The only folder sharing a direct keyword with the informal name is 2026_05_03_school_helper_kit via 'kit'. Per hint, read plausible candidate README(s) and confirm via title/tags/first paragraph.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Search projects for 'morning' or 'launch' if needed

next_step.current_state: Matched informal name 'morning launch kit' to project folder 40_projects/2026_05_03_school_helper_kit because its canonical README title is 'School Helper Kit' and its goal explicitly targets reducing school/kindergarten morning friction. The folder prefix gives the canonical start date.

function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system tree, read nested AGENTS in 40_projects, and used the project's canonical README plus folder-date rule.
function.outcome_justification: 40_projects/AGENTS.MD states project folders use the project creation date as a YYYY_MM_DD prefix and README.MD is canonical. The README at 40_projects/2026_05_03_school_helper_kit/README.MD describes a 'School Helper Kit' whose goal is to reduce 'morning friction', matching the informal project name. Therefore the canonical start date is the folder prefix rendered as 2026-05-03.
